name: system_tasks_demo
description: Demonstrates INLINE and JSON_JQ_TRANSFORM system tasks — no workers needed

inputParameters.expression: (function() { var users = { 'user-1': { name: 'Alice Johnson', department: 'Engineering', baseSalary: 95000, performanceRating: 4.5 }, 'user-2': { name: 'Bob Smith', department: 'Marketing', baseSalary: 78000, performanceRating: 3.8 }, 'user-3': { name: 'Carol Williams', department: 'Engineering', baseSalary: 110000, performanceRating: 4.9 } }; var user = users[$.userId]; if (!user) { return { error: 'User not found: ' + $.userId }; } return user; })()

(function() { var salary = $.baseSalary; var rating = $.performanceRating; var bonusPercent = 0; if (rating >= 4.5) { bonusPercent = 15; } else if (rating >= 4.0) { bonusPercent = 10; } else if (rating >= 3.0) { bonusPercent = 5; } else { bonusPercent = 0; } var bonusAmount = Math.round(salary * bonusPercent / 100); return { bonusPercent: bonusPercent, bonusAmount: bonusAmount, totalCompensation: salary + bonusAmount, tier: bonusPercent >= 15 ? 'Gold' : bonusPercent >= 10 ? 'Silver' : 'Bronze' }; })()

inputParameters.queryExpression: { summary: { employee: .user.name, department: .user.department, compensation: { base: .user.baseSalary, bonus: .bonus.bonusAmount, total: .bonus.totalCompensation }, performance: { rating: .user.performanceRating, bonusTier: .bonus.tier, bonusPercent: .bonus.bonusPercent } } }
